verses.1: A Psalm of Asaph. God takes His position in His assembly; He judges in the midst of the gods.
verses.2: How long will you judge unjustly And show partiality to the wicked? Selah
verses.3: Vindicate the weak and fatherless; Do justice to the afflicted and destitute.
verses.4: Rescue the weak and needy; Save them from the hand of the wicked.
verses.5: They do not know nor do they understand; They walk around in darkness; All the foundations of the earth are shaken.
verses.6: I said, “You are gods, And all of you are sons of the Most High.
verses.7: “Nevertheless you will die like men, And fall like one of the princes.”
verses.8: Arise, God, judge the earth! For You possess all the nations.
